svg.title: AI Customer Support Automation Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing Gmail API reading, RAG pipeline with FAISS, OpenAI generation with retry logic, and Gmail draft creation for human review.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What environment variables does this project need?')
sendPrompt('How does the Gmail API reader fetch unread emails?')
sendPrompt('How does the email preprocessor work?')
sendPrompt('What PDFs make up the knowledge base?')
sendPrompt('How does the text embedder vectorize documents?')
sendPrompt('How does FAISS perform semantic similarity search?')
sendPrompt('How does the prompt builder combine email and context?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenAI generate support replies?')
sendPrompt('How does the retry mechanism handle API failures?')
sendPrompt('What does the fallback handler return on failure?')
sendPrompt('How does the draft creator use the Gmail API?')
sendPrompt('How does the human-in-the-loop review work?')

svg.text: Logs: API calls • RAG queries • Retries • Drafts • Errors
